# Yasin Engin

> Yasin Engin is a Computer Engineering student focused on Network Automation, SDN, NDN, Go backend systems, distributed systems, and future network architectures.

## Core Profile

- Name: Yasin Engin
- Location: Samsun, Turkiye
- Focus: Network Automation, SDN, NDN, Go Backend Systems, Distributed Systems
- Education: Computer Engineering student at Ondokuz Mayis University
- Learning initiative: Netreka Academy

## Important Pages

- [Portfolio](https://yasinenginn.github.io/): Main personal website and technical hub.
- [CV](https://yasinenginn.github.io/cv.html): CV and profile summary.
- [Projects](https://yasinenginn.github.io/projects/): Featured engineering projects.
- [Notes](https://yasinenginn.github.io/notes/): Engineering notes on networking, automation, backend systems, and NDN.
- [Videos](https://yasinenginn.github.io/videos/): Netreka Academy video hub.

## Featured Projects

- [Tolerex](https://yasinenginn.github.io/projects/tolerex/): Go-based fault-tolerant distributed storage system.
- [Rehydrator](https://yasinenginn.github.io/projects/rehydrator/): CC1352R Contiki-NG firmware/OAD project.
- [Network Automation Labs](https://yasinenginn.github.io/projects/network-automation-labs/): SR Linux, Ansible, Containerlab, and gNMI labs.
